diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Coronary artery disease s/p coronary revascularization
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was supported by a history of chest pain, nausea, and shortness of breath, along with a stress echocardiogram that showed prior apical infarction and new inducible ischemia. Coronary angiography confirmed 100% proximal LAD stenosis, leading to scheduled coronary artery bypass grafting.
